creator: pfgiffun@bachue.usc.unal.edu.co
text:
astroimage shouldn't be installed in /usr/X11R6/*, Other astronomy 
packages prefer /usr/local, so LOCALBASE is the correct place. 

I will also not be able to maintain this anymore.

Fix: 

In the port's Makefile remove the following line:

USE_X_PREFIX=   yes

and replace with USE_XLIB (or whatever is used in the bsd.port.mk nowadays).
